notes: Core mechanics work (movement, shooting, shields, waves, mystery ship) but alien sprites are crude cross/rectangle shapes lacking retro fidelity, shield arch logic is inverted (bottom rows are solid, not top), and the explosion effect redraws random pixels every frame causing visual noise.

Core loop, shooting, waves, shields, scoring, and pause/title states work, but simplified visuals, some collision/state edge cases, and uneven gameplay keep it from feeling like a polished Space Invaders clone.
